name: Simulated Create – Wheelchair Service Failure
scenario_description: New passenger Sam Reeves was left without wheelchair assistance on ZA202. Tests Special Assistance / Critical severity path with a new passenger.
complaint_description: I pre-booked wheelchair assistance for flight ZA202 from Los Angeles to Seattle. No wheelchair was available at the gate upon arrival. I was forced to walk unaided to the aircraft despite a recent knee surgery. This caused significant pain and constitutes a failure in duty of care.
